projectScoped: Project-scoped task management for project {{projectId}}. Track API creates tasks through a project entry point, so this page is intentionally anchored to that context.
createTasksFromProject: Create tasks from a project context. Open a project's task entry to add the first task.
unableToLoadTasks: Unable to load tasks. Refresh to try again.
noTasksInProject: No tasks in this project yet.
noTasksInWorkspace: No tasks in this workspace yet. Open a project task entry point to create the first task.
